name: SSO Integration
description: Implement SAML-based single sign-on for enterprise customers. Multiple large deals are blocked until SSO is available. Target: Q2 compliance deadline.

name: Dashboard Redesign
description: Redesign the analytics dashboard with new charting library. Users complain current charts are slow and hard to read. No hard deadline.

name: API Rate Limiting
description: Add per-tenant rate limiting to the public API. We've had two outages this quarter from runaway integrations. Urgent reliability concern.

name: Mobile Push Notifications
description: Add push notification support for the mobile app. Marketing wants it for the summer campaign launch in July.

name: Database Migration to Postgres
description: Migrate from MySQL to PostgreSQL to support JSON querying and better scaling. Large effort with many dependencies but reduces long-term tech debt significantly.

name: Onboarding Wizard
description: Build a step-by-step onboarding flow for new users. Activation rate is 34%, well below the 50% target. Product leadership priority.

name: Bulk CSV Export
description: Allow users to export up to 100k rows as CSV. Frequent support ticket — about 20 per month. Small isolated change.

name: Audit Log
description: Add immutable audit logging for all data mutations. Required for SOC 2 certification by end of Q3.

name: Dark Mode
description: Add dark mode theme toggle to the web app. Most-upvoted feature request on the community board. Purely cosmetic.

name: Webhook Retry Logic
description: Implement exponential backoff and dead-letter queue for failed webhook deliveries. Current failure rate is 8% with no retry, causing data loss for integrators.
